commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: External PR needs contributor-provided real behavior proof and a security-aware rebase/rewrite against current proxy helpers before merge review can proceed.; Needs attention: The diff changes runtime egress routing and can bypass operator proxy policy for media-provider traffic.; Review finding: [P2] Require explicit NO_PROXY before bypassing loopback — src/infra/net/proxy-fetch.ts:136-140 - [P2] Preserve ALL_PROXY... (sha=fc5b8536de85f9f30432554aa56a469a0d59e5ca)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes media-understanding proxy fetch resolution so audio/video backend requests can bypass the proxy when their configured baseUrl matches loopback or NO_PROXY rules.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main resolves a generic media proxy fetch before the backend baseUrl is known, while upstream EnvHttpProxyAgent does not implement OpenClaw's CIDR NO_PROXY extension. I did not run a live self-hosted STT backend in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: External PR needs contributor-provided real behavior proof and a security-aware rebase/rewrite against current proxy helpers before merge review can proceed.

target.title: [AI-assisted] fix(media): bypass proxy for internal audio backends
target.author: slime-turing
